item.title: Bulk SMS Gateway Tool [Chat & Messenging]
item.itunes:title: Bulk SMS Gateway Tool [Chat & Messenging]
item.itunes:author: recoverydata
item.itunes:summary:
Bulk SMS Gateway Tool
(Chat & Messenging)
Bulk SMS tool is available on www.prodatadoctor.net and send unlimited messages for different mobile numbers by using computer connect with mobile number. Bulk SMS Gateway Tool can inform all clients of IT companies from your pc to connect mobile number. SMS software allows you to connect many numbers of GSM mobile phones join your computer for sending text message.

[read more]

item.title: Cell Phone Data Recovery Software [Utilities]
item.itunes:title: Cell Phone Data Recovery Software [Utilities]
item.itunes:author: recoverydata
item.itunes:summary:
Cell Phone Data Recovery Software
(Utilities)
Download outstanding Cell Phone Data Recovery Software from company website www.prodatadoctor.net that is fully capable to retrieve suddenly deleted files stored at mobile phone memory. Dynamic cell phone revival application helps professionals as well as novice users to get back squashed files using advance search algorithms in an effective manner. Highly reliable mobile phone contact number retrieval program facilitates user to rescue favorite songs from crashed or virus infected mobile phone handsets within shortest time of duration.

[read more]

item.title: Digital Camera Files Restore [Utilities]
item.itunes:title: Digital Camera Files Restore [Utilities]
item.itunes:author: filesrestoresoftware
item.itunes:summary:
Digital Camera Files Restore
(Utilities)
Sony handycam picture restoration tool recover entire lost or missing photographs of corrupted or virus infected digital camera. Software rescue all deleted image files like jpeg, png, raw, tiff from any branded flash camera like Olympus, Nikon etc.
[read more]

item.title: RosarioSIS [Education Apps]
item.itunes:title: RosarioSIS [Education Apps]
item.itunes:author: francoisj
item.itunes:summary:
RosarioSIS
(Education Apps)
RosarioSIS is a Student Information System designed for school management and communication.
It runs in the browser as a web application powered by PHP/SQL.
Main modules are: School, Students, Users, Scheduling, Grades, Attendance, Discipline, Food Service and Student Billing.
Numerous add-ons (modules, plugins and themes) are available. For example: Email, SMS, Messaging, Library, Hostel, Inventory, Students Import...
RosarioSIS features a responsive interface, multilingual support, PDF reports, list export to Excel, colorful statistical charts, online student registration.
A demo is available on the official website.
[read more]
item.description:

RosarioSIS is a Student Information System designed for school management and communication.

Numerous add-ons (modules, plugins and themes) are available. For example: Email, SMS, Messaging, Library, Hostel, Inventory, Students Import...
RosarioSIS features a responsive interface, multilingual support, PDF reports, list export to Excel, colorful statistical charts, online student registration.
A demo is available on the official website.

RosarioSIS is a Student Information System designed for school management and communication.
It runs in the browser as a web application powered by PHP/SQL.
Main modules are: School, Students, Users, Scheduling, Grades, Attendance, Discipline, Food Service and Student Billing.
Numerous add-ons (modules, plugins and themes) are available. For example: Email, SMS, Messaging, Library, Hostel, Inventory, Students Import...
RosarioSIS features a responsive interface, multilingual support, PDF reports, list export to Excel, colorful statistical charts, online student registration.
A demo is available on the official website.

item.title: Game Script [Developers Apps]
item.itunes:title: Game Script [Developers Apps]
item.itunes:author: procedural
item.itunes:summary:
Game Script
(Developers Apps)
Game Script is about raising the standards of what it's like to write code fast: you must be able to just double click on the program and start typing code immediately, you must be able to run the code with a single key press, and you must be able to enter the game mode, in which you can fly around in 3D space freely, like in a video game, to see your commands reliably occupy the virtual world.

[read more]

Game Script is about raising the standards of what it's like to write code fast: you must be able to just double click on the program and start typing code immediately, you must be able to run the code with a single key press, and you must be able to enter the game mode, in which you can fly around in 3D space freely, like in a video game, to see your commands reliably occupy the virtual world.

[read more]

Game Script is about raising the standards of what it's like to write code fast: you must be able to just double click on the program and start typing code immediately, you must be able to run the code with a single key press, and you must be able to enter the game mode, in which you can fly around in 3D space freely, like in a video game, to see your commands reliably occupy the virtual world.

[read more]

item.title: Software for Data Recovery [Utilities]
item.itunes:title: Software for Data Recovery [Utilities]
item.itunes:author: recoverydata
item.itunes:summary:
Software for Data Recovery
(Utilities)
Have your deleted your crucial files from computer hard disk drive and looking for perfect data recovery application? Now download effective Software for Data Recovery from website www.prodatadoctor.net that provides perfect solution to get back mistakenly erased project files, video clips, music collections, images folder etc from various types of removable devices.
